feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Process Automation
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Process Automation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Is there a way to access SAP Build Backend in SAP Build Process Automation?
entry.content:
Hi,

does anyone know if there is any way to access the SAP Build backend like visual cloud functions in SAP Build Process Automation? I have an approval workflow and need to save the result in our backend. But I can't find a way to do it.

Best regards,

Bastian

entry.title: i want to execute an unattended job on my remote desktop connection
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

i want to execute an unattened job on my remote desktop connection, i've created the unattended trigger. If I activate it directly from the control tower, nothing happens. 

I have saved the credentials in the agent and switched the mode to unattended more. 

After logging in again, the password is no longer displayed in the agent. Is this normal behavior?

Thank you and best regards 

Paul

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation date type key in action error
entry.content:
Hello all!

I'm facing an interesting error while using the actions in SAP Build Process Automation. I'm trying to query the equipment API from on premise S/4HANA system using an action, and I'm getting this error:


The request has a malformed URI syntax. The "ValidityEndDate" is not correct. It should be like:

As you can see in the image above, it works out fine in actions editor. I've tried a few things, including parsing, modifying the property and even adding a default value for the "ValidityEndDate", but I still get that malformed URI syntax.

Anyone has come across this error? If you have any idea, please let me know.

Best regards,
Rafael

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation: Line items are partially read from PDF Extraction methods
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 I am new to SAP Process Automation. I'm working on reading Invoice PDF files and posting those data into S4HANA Cloud. I was using Extract Data (Pre-trained Model) method provided by SAP to read the data. It is reading the data well, but then I noticed that line items are not fully read. If the PDF file has 6 line items and Extract Data (Pre-trained Model) method only reads first line. So I changed to another method Extract Data (Template). I used default schema as well as I tried by training a new schema. In these case it read 5 out of 6. I also noticed that when a new schema is added for training it picks all line items automatically. When it comes in calling the method only it is not recognizing the items.

My actual requirement is whenever an Invoice PDF is uploaded it should read the data and post it. So I don't prefer using Template as I will be in a position to train for each new formats of PDF.  Am I in the right direction, If so what is the solution to read all the line items. 

This is a sample PDF I am using. 

This is the output for Extract Data (Pre-trained Model) where I am using document type as Invoice. Line items are not read.

This is the output for which I created a  custom schema and trained. It read 5 out of 6.

This is when I am using SAP_invoice_schema. It is not reading any line items.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: SAP BPA Error: Project exited due to an error (null).
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Could you briefly describe, how to clarify the reason for the error message in the subject? It appears almost every project execution in Desktop Agent's Events and I would prefer to correct the root cause. 😉

Thank you very much, 

JV

entry.title: Converting image stored in a folder into a single pdf
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

I have created a automation wherein a screen recorder captures the screenshots of the page and saves all the screenshots in a folder. These folder are saved according to timestamp.

Now What I want is that all those images in the folder should be generated as in a single pdf. I am thinking to use Adobe LiveCycle Designer and Forms Services by adobe. But how do I approach the solution and set up of Adobe livecycle designer.

I have seen all the blogs related to this, but they are of no use.

Guide me here.

Regards,

Ayush

entry.title: Excel SDK installation in MAC OS for build process automation
entry.content:
Hi All,

@SAPSupport 

Has anyone installed Excel SDK for SAP build process Automation workflow?

I am following the below developer tutotial for the use case but the mentioned steps are for Windows OS only.Also VDI setup in MAC is not permitted as well.So please let me know if you have come across of this installation or any such scenario related to OS incompatibility .

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-create-excel-automation.html

Regards,

Rakesh

SAP Build

entry.title: How to run an VBscript in sap build process automation
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to invoke a vbscript in sap build process automation using custom script activity. But couldn't able to do it. Have anybody tried this using custom script or by anyother way to run an vbcode in build process automation. Please respond to this post.

@sam0072  Any suggestions from you.

entry.title: How do I model a Decision based on a Decision Table with List Input Variables
entry.content:
I'm trying to model a Decision in SAP Build Process Automation that is using inputs that are lists.

The documentation for SBPA on how to create Decisions states:

  • Once you select List, this list input parameter will be displayed under Vocabulary when you configure your conditions and results in the wizard.
  • However, you will not be able to use these list parameters to configure conditions in condition headers and these will appear greyed out in the Configure Conditions screen. See Model a Rule in a Decision Table.
  • Once a rule is added, you can use these list parameters in the cells of the decision table while modelling rule expressions.

Example

    • If you have the following input in a tabular form with the IDs of employees and their cities as list input parameters, you can use 'BLR' EXISTSIN (Employees, CityCode) to determine whether it contains the input 'BLR’. When you configure your inputs, you can use 'Employees' and select the List checkbox.

Employees

Employee_ID

CityCode

Age

L321

BLR

30

L322

MUM

40

My question is, how would I model the decision table to use the Employees List? Would I need another  condition to use Employees from the example, as Employees is not available to add as a condition?

And where do I add the EXISTSIN conditions? 'BLR' EXISTSIN(Employees, CityCode) adapted to my case always gives me syntax errors in the Condition Editor.

UPDATE:

After leaving comments in the SAP Build Process Automation documentation, and getting pointed to the blog post Understanding how-to use Table & its Functions in Business Rules and also reading Using Vocabulary Rules to Build Reusable Formulas in SAP Cloud Platform Business Rules I think I'm a step further.

Unfortunately those two blogs are from the Business Rules in SAP Workflow Service days and therefore hard to find when you search with SAP Build Process Automation terminology.

But I'm still stuck with how to model the rule that calls the decision table.

2nd UPDATE:

I had success modeling a Decision that has an Input Parameter that is a List and then evaluate a Decision Table with Hit Policy First-Match.

The part I don't know how to solve is, how can I handle results from a Decision Table with Hit Policy All Match?

I would need a nested loop to handle the multiple results returned from the Decision Table for each Employee.

Kind regards,

Sebastian

entry.title: SAP CDS service does not display data even though it exist.
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

If I deploy my application locally then in temporary port it displays data in the endpoints which do exists in the database explorer.

SS-1 :

Temporary Port:

DB Explorer Data Exist:

But once we deploy this then service created in dev space in my BTP account does not display any data in it.

Is this issue with CDS 7 ?

Note: I'm using {"auth":"mocked"} in the package.json;

Also note that even if I use xsuaa authentication then also after authentication data is not getting populated.

Can anyone help me understand what is error? or If I'm missing anything here?

With xsuaa authentication no data fetched; tested it in postman. Refer the screen shot.

My 'package.json' for reference is:

 

{
  "name": "IT_CHARM",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "A simple CAP project.",
  "repository": "<Add your repository here>",
  "license": "UNLICENSED",
  "engine": {
    "node": "^12 || ^14"
  },
  "private": true,
  "dependencies": {
    "@sap/cds": "^7",
    "@sap/cds-hana": "^2",
    "@sap/xssec": "^4",
    "express": "^4"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@cap-js/sqlite": "^1",
    "@sap/cds-dk": "^7",
    "@sap/eslint-plugin-cds": "^3",
    "eslint": "^9"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "start": "cds-serve"
  },
  "cds": {
    "build": {
      "tasks": [
        {
          "for": "hana",
          "dest": "../db"
        },
        {
          "for": "node-cf"
        }
      ]
    },
    "requires": {
      "db": {
        "kind": "hana-cloud"
      },
      "auth":"mocked"
    }
  }
}

 

 

Regards,

Ganesh N.

entry.title: SAP API Hub- Add new environment
entry.content:
I am following the tutorial to create SAP Build Automation, however I am stuck at the point to create new environment in the API Hub as mentioned in below link

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-run-process-api-trigger.html

I entered all the fields namely:  Display Name, Starting URL, Client ID and Secret, Authentication Domain, Consumer subdomain. But still it shows a pop up that a mandatory field is missing.

Can some one please help.

entry.title: Regarding Process Automation Recorder not capturing status bar section of sap gui 7.7
entry.content:
Hi guys,

I am creating process automation recorder. Now in that everything is running fine but the moment I click on the system on status bar, somehow that thing is not being captured. How do i resolve this ?

 

Click on system then hover on list, hover on save then click on save.

After this the last save is being added in recorder, but the first boxes are not coming in the recorder due to which i get error everytime i test this.

Can anyone guide me here ?

 

Best Regards,

Ayush

entry.title: Experiencing error when viewing transaction detail in SBPA Visibility Dashboard
entry.content:
Hello.

I've added and configured the visibility dashboard for Accounts Receivable, P2P, and Accounts Payable in SAP Build Process Automation. The dashboards are already showing up in the BTP launchpad and I can see the visualizations. When I click on the measures, I can see the transaction list. However, when I click one of the transactions, it does not open the detail page and I can see this error in the console:

The following error occurred while displaying routing target with name 'ScenarioInstanceDetailsSplitView': ModuleError: Failed to resolve dependencies of 'com/sap/spa/pv/instances/controller/ScenarioInstanceDetails.controller.js'
-> 'com/sap/spa/pv/instances/processpathbase/utils/ProcessFlowModelUtil.js'
-> 'com/sap/spa/pv/instances/processpathbase/extensions/galilei/metaModel/PathDomainModel.js': failed to execute module factory for ''com/sap/spa/pv/instances/processpathbase/extensions/galilei/metaModel/PathDomainModel.js'': Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'model') -

Uncaught (in promise) ModuleError: Failed to resolve dependencies of 'com/sap/spa/pv/instances/controller/ScenarioInstanceDetails.controller.js'
-> 'com/sap/spa/pv/instances/processpathbase/utils/ProcessFlowModelUtil.js'
-> 'com/sap/spa/pv/instances/processpathbase/extensions/galilei/metaModel/PathDomainModel.js': failed to execute module factory for ''com/sap/spa/pv/instances/processpathbase/extensions/galilei/metaModel/PathDomainModel.js'': Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'model')



Replication Steps:
1. Navigate to Procure to Pay Dashboard in the BTP launchpad

2. Click Open Order Items, or On Track

3. Click one of the transactions.

*Data from Guide

4. Error shared above will show up. I am not redirected to any page.


Anything else missing in the workzone configuration? As for the roles, I've already assigned everything.

Thanks.

entry.title: Custom Script parameters in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
I am trying to figure out how to input and output custom variables in a custom script in SAP Build Process Automation. It seems that the input parameter is not inputting any value into the script and it is not outputting anything either. The error I receive when trying to use the output param is 

"Invalid Argument: CommonFunctions.set: no valid value provided"

The script(step 116 of the automation) is as follows:

 

function convertWarehouseNum(warehouseNumOfPlantToCopyFrom) {
   
    const match = warehouseNumOfPlantToCopyFrom.match(/^([a-zA-Z]+)(\d+)$/);
   
    if (!match) {
        throw new Error('Invalid input format');
    }

    const letter = match[1];
    const number = match[2];
   
    // Increment the number by 1
    const incrementedNumber = (parseInt(number, 10) + 1).toString().padStart(number.length, '0');
   
    // Return the new string with the incremented number
    const warehouseNum = letter + incrementedNumber;

    return warehouseNum;
}
 
The input parameter is Step115.warehouseNumOfPlantToCopyFrom (output param of previous step)
The output parameter is Step116.warehouseNum
 
Please let me know if there is a solution.
 
Thanks

entry.title: No deployment found for project version error in SBPA when using Actions in form
entry.content:
Hi Team,
I am getting below error while opening a value help in form.
"No deployment found for project version "
I could see the Action working , when tested in Actions.
Please help me with this.
Regards,
Keerthana

entry.title: Build Process Automation - Start Web Page in incognito
entry.content:
Hello.

We have an unattended automation created for our client that automates process in S4HC SAPUI5 application, but because this client runs many bots with different SAP users, there is a requirement to initiate "Start Web Page" activity in an Incognito window (Chrome) so the correct credentials for this particular bot can be inserted. I couldnt find a place to input the "-incognito" launch flag that normally starts chrome in incognito window anywhere. Is there such an option available? There is a flag attribute in Start Web Page activity but only accepts irpa_core.enums . Can anyone advise on this please ?

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation - Limitation
entry.content:
I have built a Decision in SAP Build Process Automation as mentioned in the below blog's comment
Blog comment 

I have application which will make a API call to this decision, to validate and take action. For example it will validate a temperature against a threshold for every minute. Like 1440 in a day. In SAP BPA documentation it is mentioned only 5000 API calls/month.

Will SAP BPA be capable of handling this much requests. 

Note: I am not starting any process in SAP BPA, just validating using decision.

Tagging Experts:
@Archana

entry.title: Use cases of SAP BTP Automation Pilot
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am new to "SAP BTP Automation Pilot" , kindly help on what it provides and how it can be used and what is the uses cases of "SAP BTP Automation Pilot". Please help on this. thank you so much in advance.

Thanks & Regards,

Prasad

entry.title: Unauthorised error while connecting to Built Process automation from CPI via HTTP Receiver Adapter
entry.content:
Hi All 

We are trying to send ODATA API details to Build Process Automation using an HTTP receiver Adapter.

 

We are using OAUTH2 Client Credentials from BPA in CPI.

But while deploying the iflow ,CPI gives unauthorized error.

 

Please let me know if we are missing here any steps.

Thanks

Priya

entry.title: No projects available for my Desktop Agent
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm trying to re-use an automation scenario from store(SAP Build Process Automation).I have followed the steps https://help.sap.com/docs/IRPA_S4HANA/144f48c43d774333b158cf83044967fa/567290119cdb41d691d530c0639d2201.html, but at step 5, I do not see any projects in my agent, neither 'start' / 'record' button being visible at the agent. The agent is connected and visible in SAP Build Process Automation -> Environment -> Agents.. Projects are visible at Environment -> Projects.

Not sure,

whether 'service state' is anything to do with this problem (or)

mismatch of version at agent vs project is the problem (or)

anything to do with trigger condition ???

Any help will be appreciated!! Thanks in advance!!

SAP Build Process Automation @Archana @vipin_Ojha
